summary: Comprehensive testing of LFD Clock logistics SaaS completed successfully. Backend APIs fully functional (100% success rate). Frontend UI works perfectly with proper authentication, traffic light system, real-time countdown timers, and all interactive features. MongoDB ObjectId serialization issues from previous iteration have been completely resolved.

resolved_issues.note: Main agent successfully removed _id from response objects after insert

minor_observations.issue: Missing Description warnings in console for DialogContent

passed_tests: User signup creates account with unique forwarding email (fwd-xxxxx@lfdclock.com format)
Login with existing credentials works perfectly
Dashboard displays shipment stats cards with correct counts
Load Demo Data creates 5 shipments with varying LFD status (2 safe, 1 warning, 2 critical)
Traffic light colors work correctly: red borders for critical <24h, amber for warning <48h, green for safe >48h
Real-time countdown timers display correctly (19h 58m 28s format)
Add Shipment dialog opens with all required form fields (container, vessel, dates, notes)
Manual shipment creation works and updates dashboard immediately
Delete shipment functionality removes shipments and updates counts
Settings page loads with all 4 notification toggle switches (48h, 24h, 12h, 6h)
Notification toggle switches are functional and update backend settings
User menu dropdown navigation works (Settings, Sign Out)
Copy forwarding email button works with visual feedback
SMS notifications properly marked as MOCKED with warning message
All 16 backend API endpoints pass tests: auth, shipments CRUD, stats, demo data, settings, email parsing, notifications
